---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for OmniLSS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Include:

- API design (function signatures, parameters)
- Expected behavior
- Example usage

## Example Usage

```python
# Example of how the feature would be used
import omnilss

# Your example code here
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## R GAMLSS Reference

If this feature exists in R GAMLSS, please provide:

- Function name in R GAMLSS
- Link to R documentation
- Example R code

```r
# R GAMLSS example (if applicable)
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

## Implementation Notes

If you have ideas about how to implement this feature, please share them here:

- Relevant files to modify
- Algorithms or methods to use
- Potential challenges

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I am willing to implement this feature
- [ ] I am willing to help test this feature
- [ ] I am willing to write documentation for this feature
